angle: Post 2 of the @wearehububb launch: the tension. Staying somewhere asks for far too much today, effort is everywhere and ease is nowhere, so we're building the layer that changes that.
brief: The tension beat of the launch, text-forward and stark to contrast the image-rich hello. Near-black canvas, two big lines land one after the other, 'Effort is everywhere.' then 'Ease is nowhere.', then a quiet resolve line fades in. Monochrome, calm, no imagery. The read: the problem, named plainly, with the turn toward the fix.

copy.headline: Effort is everywhere.
copy.subhead: So we're building the layer that changes that.
